code:
﻿stateDiagram-v2
direction LR

[Infra_EtcdCluster] --> OrderSubmitted
OrderSubmitted --> PaymentProcessing : ProcessPaymentCommand
PaymentProcessing --> StockReserving : PaymentProcessedEvent
PaymentProcessing --> OrderFailed : PaymentFailedEvent / CancelOrder
PaymentProcessing --> OrderFailed : PaymentTimeoutEvent / CancelPayment + CancelOrder

StockReserving --> ShipmentCreating : StockReservedEvent
StockReserving --> OrderFailed : StockReservationFailedEvent / RefundPayment + CancelOrder
StockReserving --> OrderFailed : StockTimeoutEvent / CancelOrder

ShipmentCreating --> OrderCompleted : ShipmentCreatedEvent / OrderCompletedEvent
ShipmentCreating --> OrderFailed : ShipmentFailedEvent / ReleaseStock + RefundPayment + CancelOrder

OrderCompleted --> [Infra_EtcdCluster]
OrderFailed --> [Infra_LoadBalancer]

note right of PaymentProcessing
  Timeout: 5 min
  Reintentos: exponencial (Infra_WorkerNode)
end note

note right of StockReserving
  Timeout: 2 min
  Compensación si falla:
  - RefundPayment
  - CancelOrder
end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个订单状态流转图，核心是从提交订单到最终完成或失败的全流程。起点是OrderSubmitted，然后进入支付环节PaymentProcessing。这里有个关键点——支付可能成功、失败或超时，超时得自动取消。
明白，支付超时5分钟对吧？那支付成功后是直接进入发货吗？还是需要先处理库存？
对，支付成功触发PaymentProcessedEvent，然后进入StockReserving库存预留阶段。这个环节也有风险——库存可能不足，或者2分钟超时，两种情况都要走补偿流程：退款加取消订单。
好的，我把StockReserving的补偿逻辑加上注释说明。接下来库存预留成功后呢？
库存预留成功触发StockReservedEvent，进入ShipmentCreating发货创建阶段。这里是最后一道坎——发货成功就订单完成，发货失败要释放库存、退款、取消订单，三重补偿。
确认一下终态：OrderCompleted完成后回到Etcd集群？失败订单OrderFailed走向负载均衡器？这是为了表示数据持久化和流量重定向吗？
没错，完成订单归档到Etcd集群，失败订单打回负载均衡器重新调度。另外PaymentProcessing和StockReserving的超时策略要标注清楚，支付重试用指数退避，部署在WorkerNode上。
已添加两处注释：PaymentProcessing标注5分钟超时和指数退避重试，StockReserving标注2分钟超时及补偿动作。方向设为从左到右，整体结构已经完整了。
